summary: The graph contains 82 nodes and 390 directed import edges with moderate density (~0.06) and is largely one connected component with a few isolated configuration/package files (babel.config.js, package.json, tsconfig.json). Most nodes are source modules (controllers, services, models, utils) including 3 test files and ~9 model files; prominent hubs are src/utils/consts.ts, src/app.ts, src/config/database.ts, src/models/User.ts and core services (auth/prompt) while the configuration files noted above are effectively isolated. All edges are directed "imports" (no other relationship types); imports flow from routes -> controllers -> services -> models/utils, and middlewares are widely re-used across routes. Architectural patterns include star-like hubs (consts and app), layered linear chains and feature clusters (auth, prompt, subscription), and a notable small circular dependency between src/utils/consts.ts and src/services/system.service.ts that may need refactoring.
